report.title: Report a problem
report.intro: Tell us what went wrong and we'll open an issue on GitHub for you.
report.privacyNote: Your report is filed as a public GitHub issue. Your email is never published — we identify you by an internal id only.
report.cooldown: You just sent a report. You can send another in {seconds}s.

fields.category: What kind of problem is it?
fields.bodyPlaceholder: What happened, and what did you expect instead?
fields.contactConsent: You can contact me about this report

success.title: Thanks — your report is filed
success.screenshotHint: Have a screenshot? Open the issue and drag the image straight into it.

errors.rateLimited: You just sent a report. Give it a minute before sending another.
errors.invalid: Please choose a category and fill in both the title and the description.
errors.submissionFailed: We couldn't reach GitHub, so the report wasn't filed. Your text is still here.

notFound.title: 404: Page not found
notFound.fromLine: From FantasyWiki, the encyclopedia of pages nobody has written
notFound.body: {path} has never been written, viewed, or signed by any team{citation}.
notFound.stubNotice: This page is a stub. You can help by navigating somewhere that exists.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.body: FantasyWiki is a non-commercial university project, provided as-is and without any warranty. Playing is free and the in-game budget and points have no monetary value.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: You sign in with your Google account. We store only your name, email address and profile picture, kept in a session cookie and alongside your game data (teams and leagues). There are no ads, analytics or other tracking.

attribution.title: Wikimedia attribution
attribution.body: Pageview data comes from the Wikimedia Pageviews API. Article titles and content belong to Wikipedia and are available under the CC BY-SA 4.0 license. FantasyWiki is not affiliated with or endorsed by the Wikimedia Foundation.

hero.title: Build Your {empire}
hero.description: Draft Wikipedia articles, earn points from real search trends, and compete in weekly tournaments. The ultimate fantasy game for the curious mind.
hero.creditsNote: Start with 1,000 credits • No credit card required

howItWorks.title: How {brand} Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Join thousands of players competing in the ultimate knowledge-based fantasy game.

search.title: Search Articles
search.description: Explore millions of Wikipedia articles. Find trending topics, hidden gems, or your favorite subjects.

portfolio.title: Build Your Portfolio
portfolio.description: Buy articles with your 1,000 starting credits. Choose contract durations from 3 to 90 days.

points.title: Earn Points Daily
points.description: Score points based on real Wikipedia pageviews. Trending articles = more points!

compete.title: Compete & Win
compete.description: Climb the leaderboard, join weekly tournaments, and earn bonus rewards.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for the ultimate fantasy knowledge experience.

liveMarkets.title: 24/7 Live Markets
liveMarkets.description: Buy, sell, and trade articles anytime. The market never sleeps.

realTimeScoring.title: Real-Time Scoring
realTimeScoring.description: Points calculated daily from actual Wikipedia pageview data.

chemistry.title: Chemistry Bonuses
chemistry.description: Link related articles for bonus points, FIFA-style.

dynamicPricing.title: Dynamic Pricing
dynamicPricing.description: Article prices adjust based on trending topics and demand.

privateLeagues.title: Private Leagues
privateLeagues.description: Create private leagues and compete with friends.

weeklyTournaments.title: Weekly Tournaments
weeklyTournaments.description: Join automatic weekly competitions for bonus rewards.

powerTournaments.title: Power Tournaments
powerTournaments.description: Monthly elite competitions for the top performers.

fairPlay.title: Fair Play
fairPlay.description: Transparent scoring system based on public data.

leaderboardPreview.title: Compete for {glory}
leaderboardPreview.subtitle: Every week, all active players automatically enter a competitive tournament. Climb the ranks, earn bonus points, and prove your knowledge dominance.

articleLeaderboard.unavailable: Top article data unavailable right now.
articleLeaderboard.viewsUnavailable: Total views not available right now

cta.title: Ready to Build Your Knowledge Empire?
cta.description: Join thousands of players already competing in the world's first Wikipedia-based fantasy game. Start with 1,000 free credits.
cta.footer: No credit card required • Free to play • Win real rewards

neededAttention.title: Attention Needed
neededAttention.requiringAction: {count} contract requiring action | {count} contracts requiring action
neededAttention.noneNeedAttention: No contracts need attention right now

bench.title: Bench
bench.emptyHint: Purchase articles from the market to add them here

pitch.swapInstruction: Select a position to swap with

contract.title: Contract Details
contract.renewalChargeAtExpiry: ~{amount} cr will be charged at expiry
contract.renewalRefundAtExpiry: ~{amount} cr will be refunded at expiry

ownership.resolvingSubtitle: Actions will appear when your team context is ready.

login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your leagues and track your team.
login.authRequired: That page is for signed-in players. Sign in to continue.
login.termsPrefix: By signing in you agree to our {terms} and {privacy}.

teamCreation.created: Team Created! 🎉 "{name}" is ready to compete in {league}.

teamDashboard.noLeagueHint: Select a league from the navbar to view your dashboard.

teamPage.title: Team Management
teamPage.saveFailed: Couldn't save your lineup. Please try again.
